title: Endless Spring (STL+)
description: A mod that expands on 1.21.5 adding new features that fit with the update
body:
Do you think the 1.21.5 Spring to Life update didn't add enough, Well this mod is for you!
 
In this mod we plan to expand on Minecraft 1.21.5 with features players wanted as well as features that just fit the update
 
The First update comes with some more changes to the Forest & Birch Forest, It adds Brown Bears, Humming Birds, Butterfly Bushes and More!
[Showcase Video](https://youtu.be/xi9Kz7xb7KA)

If you have suggestions for possible future features let us know! The best place is in Belgie's Discord under the suggestions forum! - Join Belgies Discord

Huge Thanks to Centauri, TheBlockyGoat, Serp, Werden, AChefsLife & Admiral for helping with the mod!
